2378.reason: [When tokenType doesn't match any expected cases (SEMICN, RPARENT, RBRACK), errorToken remains null and adding null to errorTokens will cause issues. Also, the method returns null token which may cause NullPointerException in caller methods that expect a valid Token.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [When tokenType doesn't match any expected cases (SEMICN, RPARENT, RBRACK), errorToken remains null and adding null to errorTokens will cause issues. Also, the method returns null token which may cause NullPointerException in caller methods that expect a valid Token.]
